3011220.name: Encounters
3011220.description:
Encounters is a First-Person, open-world exploration game where you work as a government agent whose job is to use tools to track and gather information on possible threats. After strange radar readings and reports in a small isolated town, you are tasked with determining the validity of these reports

Earn money by collecting supernatural evidence (Taking photos, Collecting radioactive material, Player Reports) of cryptids and aliens

Spend that money on more advanced means of detection (Live Cameras, Radio Anmoly Detector) or player upgrades (Compass, Binoculars, Flashlight)

Explore the open world and find all the secrets

But watch out for each entity has unique behaviour

Can you get the the bottom of what's happening in this small town?


FEATURES:

Day/Night Cycle

Pickup and stow system

Dynamic outdoor ambiance

Ingame printable pictures

Drivable Truck
3011220.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
